findings.description: The knowledge file shows `@YYYYMMDD(allowFormat = "yyyy/MM/dd")` but the source code example contains `@YYYYMMDD(allowFomat = "yyyy/MM/dd")` (note: `allowFomat` without the 'r'). The knowledge file silently corrects this typo rather than faithfully reproducing the source code.
findings.source_evidence: Source line: `@YYYYMMDD(allowFomat = "yyyy/MM/dd")` — the attribute name is misspelled as `allowFomat` in the source code block

findings.description: The annotation attributes table in s2 lists `messageId` as a configurable attribute, but `messageId` is not included in the s2 hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source annotation attributes table first column: `allowFormat` (必須), `messageId` — `messageId` is a key property name from the table that should appear in hints
